character_identity_card: CONCUBINE IDENTITY (LOCKED, IDENTICAL CORE TRAITS IN EVERY SCENE, only outfit and hairstyle evolve with age): young Chinese girl from Ming Dynasty. Face: perfectly circular, 100% pure white (#FFFFFF), flat, no shading, no skin tone. Features: 2 small black dot eyes symmetrical with thin almond-shaped eyebrow strokes above (slight arc, delicate), 1 short horizontal black mouth line. NO nose. NO cheeks. Hair: JET BLACK, long, straight, always tied and styled in traditional Ming fashion — at age 12-13 simple low bun at the nape, at 14-16 elaborate twin buns with gold or jade hairpins, at 22+ elegant high chignon with phoenix or lotus ornament. Small ornamental hairpins vary by age but hair is ALWAYS jet black, ALWAYS tied up. Body: slim, small frame, evolves from malnourished 12yo in plain grey-brown tunic → 13-14yo scrubbing servant in plain cream hanfu with dirty hem → 15yo in simple silk robe with light embroidery → 16+ in layered silk robes with brocade trims → 22 in richer silk with phoenix motifs → 25 thin and pale in faded silk. Bound feet: always tiny silk slippers (red, pink, or muted colors with subtle embroidery), never bare feet visible, a painful small stance visible in her slight forward lean. Hands: pure white MITTEN shapes, no finger detail visible. May hold: wine jar, tea cup, silk fan, lacquer box, silk handkerchief, infant bundle. Pose should vary per scene but CORE IDENTITY (white round face, jet black tied hair, delicate stance on bound feet, silk robe) IS IMMUTABLE.
character_block: The central subject is the Concubine (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: EVERY other human character — eunuchs, senior consorts, Empress Mother, Emperor, nobles, servants, guards, maids, physicians, merchants, procurers, father, children, EVERYONE — MUST share the white round featureless face style: pure WHITE ROUND FACE with only tiny black dot eyes, thin eyebrow strokes, and minimal straight mouth line. NO realistic human faces, NO skin tones, NO noses, NO cheeks, NO wrinkles, NO visible teeth. Hands always pure white mitten shapes. Secondary characters differ by: hair style (topknot for men, buns for women, shaved for eunuchs, bun with scar for Empress Mother — a SINGLE thin black scar line from temple to jaw on a white face), beards/moustaches as black shapes attached to the white face (only for older men and Emperor), and clothing. Key markers: EUNUCHS in plain dark grey-blue robes with white cuffs, beardless, soft pale faces; SENIOR CONSORTS in peach-blossom silk with elaborate hair ornaments; EMPRESS MOTHER in deep crimson silk with gold dragon embroidery, severe bun, the white scar; EMPEROR in yellow imperial robes with gold dragon embroidery, small black beard, tired eyes; GUARDS in dark leather and red silk sashes with curved sabers; FATHER in coarse grey peasant tunic; PROCURER in dark travel cloak. The WHITE ROUND FACE is non-negotiable on every humanoid in the frame.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): children's picture book / storytime YouTube animation, matching the reference image art style. Pure 2D cel-shading — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime. Outlines: uniform, bold black, ~3-5px thickness everywhere (characters, props, architecture, textiles, calligraphy). Colors: flat fills with at most 2-3 tonal shades per object (no smooth gradients on faces or bodies). Palette dominant: imperial vermilion red (forbidden-city walls and lanterns), imperial gold (roof tiles, dragon motifs, hairpins), deep jade green (screens, jewelry), peach-blossom pink (consort silk), lacquer black (doors, beams, furniture), pale ivory cream (paper screens), ink-blue (smoke, shadows), muted dusty grey (peasant clothes in the opening). Lighting: warm amber lantern-light by night casting long soft shadows on red walls, pale overcast daylight in courtyards, moody blue moonlight outdoors, flickering candlelight in intimate scenes, NO harsh shadows on faces. Architecture: curved tiled roofs, red lacquered columns, paper-panel doors with carved lattice, golden dragon motifs, jade screens. Textiles: elaborate embroidered silk with floral/phoenix/dragon motifs carry subtle black outline pattern. Aspect ratio: 16:9 cinematic. Composition: environment fills the frame, Concubine often small in the frame (emphasizing how tiny she feels in the vast Forbidden City), even when she is central she is dwarfed by red pillars or silk curtains.
style_block: clean 2D cel-shading storytime YouTube animation style, bold thick black outlines, flat simple colors, Ming Dynasty Forbidden City aesthetic, imperial reds and golds, warm lantern-lit palaces, cinematic composition, 16:9
negative_prompt: realistic human faces, human skin tones on faces, realistic facial features, detailed cheeks, wrinkled realistic faces, detailed eyes, detailed noses, visible teeth, detailed skin texture, 3D rendering, photorealistic, detailed fingers, gradient shading on skin, heavy shadows on face, anime style, text, watermark, characters with normal human faces, mix of art styles, some characters realistic some cartoon, inconsistent character appearance, Concubine with loose untied hair, Concubine without bound-feet slippers, European setting, medieval Europe, modern Chinese setting, Qing Dynasty queue hairstyles
